untranslatable_reason: The pattern requires tracking 10 consecutively higher highs with each day's shadow above the prior day's high. This requires sequential bar-by-bar validation across a 10-candle window. The engine cannot express: (1) counting consecutive occurrences across N bars, (2) comparing current bar's upper_wick to bar[N-1].high for N=10 bars back, or (3) enforcing ALL 10 prior bars meet the condition. Standard indicators and operators do not support multi-bar sequential pattern matching of this complexity.
translation_notes: The entry conditions provided are a simplified approximation: high > prev_high (consecutive higher high) and upper_wick > prev_high (shadow above prior high). However, this only validates 1 bar ahead, not 10 consecutive bars. The actual pattern requires a custom multi-bar validator or loop construct not available in this rule engine. Exit condition inferred as close crossing below prior low (breakout failure).
